title: OAuth Client Registration Config
description: OAuth 2.1 client configuration for frontend applications. Sent to POST /auth/oauth/register by 02-register-oauth-client.sh. Follows RFC 7591 (Dynamic Client Registration).

client_name.description: Human-readable name shown in consent screens and admin dashboards

redirect_uris.description: Allowed OAuth callback URLs. Must match exactly during authorization.

grant_types.description: OAuth grant types this client supports

token_endpoint_auth_method.description: How the client authenticates at the token endpoint. 'none' for public clients (SPA/mobile with PKCE).

scope.description: Space-separated list of requested OAuth scopes
